title: Pokémon Card Robberies in the UK
summary: Pokémon cards are being stolen from shops in the UK because they have become very valuable. These cards are collectible items that people have enjoyed for 30 years, but recently, some rare cards have sold for millions of pounds. This has made criminals interested in stealing them. Shops in places like Warrington, Rugby, and Bristol have been broken into, with thieves taking cards worth thousands of pounds. The police are working together to stop these crimes. Experts say thieves think Pokémon cards are easier to steal than banks or jewelry stores. One shop owner described how robbers used a van and broke glass to steal cards quickly. This shows how the high prices of Pokémon cards are leading to more thefts.

background_read: Pokémon cards are trading cards based on the Pokémon video games and TV show. They have been popular since the 1990s, with people collecting them for fun or to trade. Some cards are very rare and can sell for a lot of money, especially if they are in good condition or feature popular characters like Pikachu. This has made them targets for theft, as criminals see them as valuable items that are easier to steal from shops than other expensive things.
Article_Structure: WHO: Thieves and shop owners in the UK
WHAT: Robberies of Pokémon card shops
WHERE: Across the UK, including Warrington and Bristol
WHY: Because Pokémon cards have become very valuable

perspectives.description: Thieves see Pokémon cards as easy and lucrative targets for theft.
Shop owners are victims of break-ins and lose valuable stock.
